generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline score is -584 (strong opposition to mainstream journalism). The attack is a low-complexity T1 headline misframing reinforcing the same direction. The profile is highly neurotic (94th pct), with very high anger/hostility and anxiety, and low trust (22nd pct) — all surfaces that amplify threat salience and elite-distrust framing. However, as a brief atomic exposure, movement is limited. The small 25-point additional hardening reflects the alignment amplifying pre-existing hostility without deep engagement.
